responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
The average college fee is around 50000 per year.
We offer BCA, MCA, BBA, MBA and B.Tech courses.
BCA is a 3 year undergraduate program focused on computer applications.
MCA is a 2 year postgraduate program in computer applications.
You can apply online through our college admission portal.
Yes, separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls.
Our college provides a digital library with thousands of books.
Our college provides placement support with many IT companies visiting every year.
You can contact us at infojd@college.com or call 9876543210.
